description: Tests skill invocation on real BLE project prompts. Positive cases: plan/implement/modify/add keywords, or any plan involving new logic. Negative cases: read-only, explain, search, build ops.
note: Prompts use $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT — set this env var to your local BLE project root before running.

evals.prompt: I want to add a call to GAPBondMgr_FindAddr at the top of HCI_SendDataPkt in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/source/ti/ble5stack_flash/hci/cc26xx/hci.c to verify the peer is bonded before sending data. The HCI data path must complete within 10μs at 48 MHz (480 cycles total). Both functions are compiled into $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/CC2340R5/basic_ble.out. Will adding exceed the targeted execution time?
evals.expected_output: A preflight report where the skill runs asm-analyze extract-cfg on GAPBondMgr_FindAddr from basic_ble.out and flags a latency risk: GAPBondMgr_FindAddr performs NV storage reads and RPA resolution loop iterations, which cannot complete within a 480-cycle budget. Execution fit should be ADJUST PLAN or STOP.

assertions.text: Response includes a preflight report section
assertions.description: Adding a new callee to a timing-constrained function requires preflight

assertions.text: Preflight call graph section flags a latency or timing risk — GAPBondMgr_FindAddr involves NV lookups or RPA resolution that would violate the 10μs / 480-cycle budget
assertions.description: The skill must surface the hot-path latency concern from the CFG analysis of GAPBondMgr_FindAddr

assertions.text: Preflight Execution fit is ADJUST PLAN or STOP, not GOOD
assertions.description: An NV-reading callee on a sub-10μs HCI data path is not safe without a plan adjustment

evals.prompt: Explain what GAPBondMgr_FindAddr does in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/source/ti/ble5stack_flash/host/gapbondmgr.c and describe what each parameter means.
evals.expected_output: A read-only explanation of the function and its parameters — no preflight block.

assertions.text: Response does NOT include a '## Preflight:' section or 'Preflight GAPBondMgr_FindAddr:' line
assertions.description: Read-only request — no new logic is being written, skill should stay quiet

evals.prompt: Implement a retry loop inside HCI_SendDataPkt in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/source/ti/ble5stack_flash/hci/cc26xx/hci.c that retries up to 3 times if the connection handle is invalid before returning an error.
evals.expected_output: A preflight report covering call graph ordering and timing/energy — followed by the implementation plan.

assertions.text: Response includes a preflight report (either '## Preflight:' header or 'Preflight HCI_SendDataPkt:' shorthand)
assertions.description: 'Implement' keyword + new loop logic should trigger preflight

assertions.text: Preflight report appears before the code or edit steps
assertions.description: Skill rule: preflight during planning, not after writing

evals.prompt: How should I modify Connection_getConnIndex in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/examples/rtos/LP_EM_CC2340R53/ble5stack/basic_ble_profiles/app/app_connection.c to return -1 instead of 0 when no connection is found, so callers can distinguish between index 0 and not-found?
evals.expected_output: A preflight report followed by a plan for the signature/logic change.

assertions.text: Response includes a preflight report section
assertions.description: 'How should I modify' is a planning phrase that precedes writing

evals.prompt: Add a method to GAPBondMgr_FindAddr in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/source/ti/ble5stack_flash/host/gapbondmgr.c that also returns the bond index as an output parameter alongside the existing return value.
evals.expected_output: A preflight report covering the signature change, call graph impact on existing callers, and timing/energy analysis.

assertions.text: Response includes a preflight report section
assertions.description: 'Add a method' / signature change with new output parameter requires preflight

evals.prompt: /plan Add exponential backoff to the connection parameter update retry logic in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/examples/rtos/LP_EM_CC2340R53/ble5stack/basic_ble_profiles/app/app_connection.c. Each retry should double the wait interval up to a cap of 10 seconds.
evals.expected_output: A preflight report covering call graph and timing/energy analysis followed by plan steps.

assertions.text: Response includes a preflight report section
assertions.description: /plan + new logic must trigger preflight

evals.prompt: Think through how to add a watchdog reset inside OAD_processQueue in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/source/ti/ble5stack_flash/profiles/oad/cc26xx/oad.c if the queue has been stalled for more than 30 seconds.
evals.expected_output: A preflight report covering call graph (watchdog API call from within OAD queue processing) and timing/energy — then the approach.

assertions.text: Response includes a preflight report section
assertions.description: 'Think through how to add' is thinking/planning mode with new logic — skill must fire

evals.prompt: What parameters does GAP_DeviceInit in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/source/ti/ble5stack_flash/host/gap.c take and what does each one do? I'm trying to understand the initialization flow.
evals.expected_output: A parameter-by-parameter explanation of GAP_DeviceInit — no preflight block.

assertions.text: Response does NOT include a '## Preflight:' section
assertions.description: Pure explanation request — no code change intended, skill must stay quiet

evals.prompt: Show me the body of OAD_processQueue in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/source/ti/ble5stack_flash/profiles/oad/cc26xx/oad.c — I want to understand it before we make changes.
evals.expected_output: A read-only display of the function body — no preflight block.

assertions.text: Response does NOT include a '## Preflight:' section
assertions.description: Read-only navigation request — no function logic being written

evals.prompt: Review OAD_open in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/source/ti/ble5stack_flash/profiles/oad/cc26xx/oad.c for potential issues. Don't change anything yet — just tell me what you find.
evals.expected_output: A code review with observations — no preflight block since no change is planned.

assertions.text: Response does NOT include a '## Preflight:' section
assertions.description: 'Don't change anything' is explicit analysis mode — preflight would be premature

evals.prompt: /plan Write a function that validates a BLE connection handle before passing it to HCI_SendDataPkt in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/source/ti/ble5stack_flash/hci/cc26xx/hci.c — return an error code if the handle is out of range.
evals.expected_output: A preflight report followed by the plan — 'write a function' inside /plan must trigger preflight.

assertions.text: Response includes a preflight report section
assertions.description: /plan + 'write a function' is an explicit write-intent trigger

evals.prompt: /plan Add a call to GAPBondMgr_FindAddr at the top of HCI_SendDataPkt in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/source/ti/ble5stack_flash/hci/cc26xx/hci.c to verify the peer is bonded before sending data. Both functions are compiled into $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/CC2340R5/basic_ble.out. Report the energy cost of adding this callee.
evals.expected_output: A preflight report that includes per-callee energy values in uWs from the LOCI MCP and a hot-path energy total.

assertions.text: Response includes a preflight report section
assertions.description: /plan + adding a callee must trigger preflight

assertions.text: Preflight includes an Energy: line reporting energy in uWs
assertions.description: Energy must be reported for callee analysis per SKILL.md

evals.prompt: Implement a retry loop inside a function in /tmp/nonexistent-project/src/main.c that retries up to 3 times. There is no compiler configured and no build system detected for this project.
evals.expected_output: A preflight STOPPED block stating that no compiled artifact is available and compilation is not possible. The skill must NOT produce Call graph, Latency, Energy, or Execution fit lines.

assertions.text: Response includes 'Preflight: STOPPED' or 'STOPPED' indicating the skill cannot proceed
assertions.description: No compiler and no binary means preflight must hard stop

assertions.text: Response does NOT contain a 'Call graph:' line or 'Execution fit: GOOD' line
assertions.description: Preflight must not produce analysis output when compilation is not possible

evals.prompt: Add a call to GAPBondMgr_FindAddr as the first check inside OAD_open in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/source/ti/ble5stack_flash/profiles/oad/cc26xx/oad.c — so OAD rejects image transfers from unbonded devices before doing any setup.
evals.expected_output: A preflight report where the call graph check flags a call-order hazard: GAPBondMgr_FindAddr requires the bond manager to be initialized, and OAD_open may be called before that precondition is guaranteed in the stack startup sequence.

assertions.text: Response includes a preflight report section
assertions.description: Adding a new callee with an initialization dependency requires preflight

assertions.text: Preflight call graph section flags a call-order or initialization hazard — GAPBondMgr_FindAddr has a dependency on the bond manager being initialized before OAD_open is invoked
assertions.description: This is the primary call-order scenario from the skill's CFG analysis check
